info.name: Famous Free APIs
info.description: A collection of globally popular free public APIs created by Gemini.

request.description: Ultra-fast AI inference using Groq LPU hardware.
Unified gateway for accessing dozens of AI models.
Get a random high-quality photo from Unsplash.
Daily trending movies from The Movie Database.
Generate QR codes on the fly.
Real-time cryptocurrency market data and prices.
Latest cryptocurrency news from verified sources.
Real-time earthquake data from the United States Geological Survey.
Real-time list of malicious URLs used for malware distribution.
Check if a password has been leaked using k-Anonymity (prefix 21BD1).
Directory of certified open-source hardware projects.
Search millions of CC0 public domain images from the Smithsonian.
Access metadata for millions of cultural heritage items from Europe.
Real photos taken by the Curiosity rover on Mars.
Explore the latest open-source AI models from Hugging Face.
Total population data for all countries from the World Bank.
Get the latest breaking news headlines from the US.
Returns a random fact about cats.
Returns the current Bitcoin price in USD using the CoinGecko API. This is a free public API that doesn't require authentication.
Returns your public IP address.
Predicts the age of a person based on their name.
Returns a random joke.
Returns a list of universities in a specified country.
